articles.title: About Me
articles.contents:
I’m a second year resident at Vanderbilt University Medical Center.
I’m in the Harrison Society for medical research with a focus on rheumatology and auto-immunity.
For fun, I like to spend time with my partner (@maithripriya) and go jogging.

articles.title: Untitled
articles.description: A new article created using the Distill format.
articles.contents:
Distill is a publication format for scientific and technical writing, native to the web.
Learn more about using Distill for R Markdown at https://rstudio.github.io/distill.
